subject: A crystalline humanoid golem made of faceted prismatic glass or gemstone, crouched in a forward-leaning pose with reflective shards forming its body
description: A faceted, crystalline golem made of countless prismatic shards crouches forward in a sunlit clearing. Its body is a chaotic mass of mirrored, gem-like fragments that catch light in cool blues, silvers, and faint rainbow refractions. The figure is humanoid in silhouette but inorganic — limbs and torso resolve into a tessellated cluster of crystals. Behind it, a luminous forest backdrop blurs into golden-green light, with sun streaming through unseen foliage and creating a soft bokeh of yellow and white highlights. The contrast between the cold reflective crystal body and the warm, glowing forest creates a magical, jewel-like atmosphere.
foreground: Crystalline golem of mirrored prismatic shards, crouched and reflective
background: Sunlit forest with soft golden bokeh and blurred green foliage
emotion: alert, poised, inorganic stillness with latent motion
